title: 6th-8th Science Teacher Applicant Pool
summary: Applicant pool for future IDEA Austin middle-school science openings. The teacher is expected to help students master academic and social skills for college readiness, set ambitious achievement goals, build a strong classroom culture, plan rigorous instruction, assess mastery, track progress, analyze data, and adjust instruction.

notes: Starting teacher salary listed for candidates with 0 years of experience.
Certification, credential, and campus leadership stipends may apply.
Additional pay may be available for assigned after-school tutoring or Saturday school.

required_education: Bachelor's degree from an accredited four-year educational institution
preferred_credentials: Evidence of content-area proficiency through certification, field of study, or work experience
responsibilities: Teach state standards and IDEA curriculum for assigned science grade levels.
Plan and deliver rigorous instruction aligned to grade-level objectives.
Submit weekly lesson plans in advance for feedback.
Use formal and informal assessments to monitor each student's progress.
Update gradebook and adjust lesson plans based on learning data.
Communicate student progress to students and families weekly.
Use classroom technology to support instruction and work management.
Maintain a clear, consistent behavior-management system.
Support school culture and contribute to a productive learning environment.
Build cooperative relationships with students and families.
Participate in manager check-ins, grade-level meetings, duties, school meetings, and professional development.
demo_notes: Good option for applicants with science teaching background even when Texas certification is preferred rather than required by the posting.
